retry_reason: The operation is unconditional; the callee handles refcount decrement internally and no return value indicates failure. Retrying would be a double release.
contract_summary: This function releases the interrupt affinity notifier for a given IRQ vector by clearing the notifier via irq_set_affinity_notifier(irq->vector, NULL). This decrements the internal kref of the notifier and disables future notifications. After calling this function, the caller must not use the notifier again. Typically called during IRQ teardown or cleanup, and the caller must ensure the IRQ vector is no longer in active use.
